ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the sale occurred */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the item sold */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific item sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the item */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_records_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_records_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES store_locations ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_records_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the item belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category the item belongs to */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory the item belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item currently available in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity required to trigger a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the item reaches the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_locations" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales analysis record */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the analysis */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the analysis */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand for the analysis */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item for the analysis */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the brand and item */,
  "total_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity sold for the brand and item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_analysis_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_analysis_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, staff) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "low_inventory_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item with low inventory */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold quantity that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_low_inventory_alerts_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the trend */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand for the trend */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item for the trend */,
  "sales_growth" REAL /* Sales growth percentage for the brand and item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)
